headline: Transcript: US hits Gautam Adani with bribery charges
summary: Kasia Broussalian talks to Joe Miller and Chris Giles
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘US hits Gautam Adani with bribery charges’

Kasia Broussalian Good morning from the Financial Times. Today is Friday, November 22nd. And this is your FT News Briefing.

There’s been a shake-up in Donald Trump’s search for his top law enforcement officer. And Gautam Adani’s corporate empire is in disarray. Plus, my colleague Chris Giles has a hot take on tariffs and inflation.

Chris Giles When academics have looked across the whole piece, they don’t see a big price effect. In fact, they see barely any price effect at all.

Kasia Broussalian I’m Kasia Broussalian, and here’s the news you need to start your day. [MUSIC PLAYING]Matt Gaetz withdrew his name from consideration for US attorney-general yesterday. The former Florida congressman said it had become, quote, unfairly distracting. US president-elect Donald Trump shocked Congress when he picked Gaetz to lead the Department of Justice.
